prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-5INCHSTORAGECAPSULE-BLACK Product Type: SURVIVAL_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 5 Inch Portable Aluminum Waterproof EDC Storage Containers with Carabiner Clip Camping Essentials, Black Description: Whether traveling, backpacking, camping, hiking, boating and more, a secure, ultra lightweight and waterproof storage container is an essential item to keep valuables safe, dry and protected from any impending damage. Medication, money, matches, first aid supplies, jewelry or keys is just the shortlist of personal items or gear that could be stored in this EDC waterproof capsule.

Featuring a built in rubber O-ring seal, this travel accessories or camping essentials storage container is as mentioned, waterproof, keeping important contents dry and free of moisture, even if fully submerged in water. The storage container capsule also comes with built in carabiner clip and key chain, providing versatile bag, luggage or backpack or on person attachment options. The lightweight but durable aluminum alloy material construction means the travel container will add virtually no weight to carry on or travel bags.

While we take these camping or hiking most regularly, they could also be suitable for following applications: travel, boating, natural disaster survival kit, with survival gear, biking, skiing or snowboarding, cycling, backpacking, with emergency preparedness items, bug out bags, prepper supplies, EDC gear and more!

Keep valuables organized, safe and moisture free with ASR Outdoors aluminum storage container capsules with carabiner clips, available in black or silver colorways.

Dimensions: 5.0 x 1.5 inches Search Terms: Storage container EDC every day carry fishing camping survival hiking outdoor hunting tactical gear camping travel essentials backpacking pill case key chain prepper geocaching supplies match holder carabiner bug out bag emergency preparedness items Features: - STORAGE CONTAINERS: Made from lightweight aluminum, this airtight screw top waterproof storage container with rubber seal from ASR Outdoor keeps important and valuable items dry, secure and protected, whether for camping, backpacking, hiking, travel and more - CAMPING ESSENTIALS: Ideal to keep valuable items dry and protected when backpacking, biking, skiing or snowboarding, boating and more; suitable for bug out bags, emergency preparedness items, natural disaster survival kits and prepper supplies to keep valuables organized, safe and moisture free - TRAVEL ACCESSORIES: A great travel essentials item, securely pack and store money, medication, keys, first aid supplies, jewelry and more in these waterproof storage containers; lightweight aluminum design will add virtually no weight to carry on or travel bags - CARABINER CLIP KEY CHAIN: Aluminum screw top waterproof storage containers come with built in carabiner clip and key chain for versatile bag, backpack or on person attachment - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 5.0 x 1.5 inches; Weight: 0.22lbs; Colors: Black or Silver === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5 Inch Black Waterproof Storage Capsule

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 5-in Black Aluminum Waterproof Storage Capsule

anthropic.title_differentiation: Aluminum EDC Container, Waterproof O-Ring Seal, Carabiner Clip, Camping And Survival Gear

openai.title_differentiation: Rubber O-Ring Seal, Airtight Screw Top, Carabiner Clip, Lightweight Aluminum, EDC Travel, Camping, Waterproof
